message: Let's find a fair price. I suggest starting with a bid of 50 to ensure a trade benefits us both.
50 is too low for me. I’ll ask 56; if you bid 60, we trade at 58—good surplus for both. Can you do 60?
I can do 58 this round if you ask 54, ensuring a fair split. Let’s trade at 56.
I can’t do 54. I’ll ask 58 this round. If you bid 62, we clear at 60—good split. Otherwise at least we clear at 58. Deal?
I can bid 63 if you ask 59 this round, clearing at 61. That’s a fair split and better than last round’s 60.
I’ll ask 61 this round. If you bid 65, we clear at 63—fair progression for both. Can you do 65?
I’ll bid 66 if you ask 62 this round, clearing at 64—fair and better than last round. Deal?
I’ll ask 64. If you bid 68, we clear at 66—fair progression and better for both. Deal?
I’ll bid 70 if you ask 66 this round, clearing at 68—fair and better than last round’s loss. Deal?
I’ll ask 69. You bid 73 so we clear at 71—fair progression and better than 67. Even if you bid 70, we still clear near 70. Deal?
I’ll bid 70 if you ask 64 this round, clearing at 67—better than last round’s loss. Deal?
67 is too low. Last round cleared at 71. I’ll ask 70; you bid 74; we clear at 72—fair progression for both. Deal?
I’ll ask 75. You bid 79 and we clear at 77—fair and better for both. If you want tighter, bid 75; we clear at 75. Deal?
I’ll bid 75 if you ask 70 this round, clearing at 72.5—better than last round’s loss. Deal?
I’ll bid 72 if you ask 68 this round, clearing at 70—better than last round’s loss. Deal?
I can’t do 68. I’ll ask 72; you bid 76 and we clear at 74—fair and consistent with earlier rounds. If you prefer tighter, bid 72 and we clear at 72. Deal?
I’ll bid 70 if you ask 66 this round, clearing at 68—better than last round’s loss. Deal?
66 is too low. I'll ask 72; you bid 72 and we clear at 72 - same as last two trades. Drop below 72 and there's no trade. Deal?
I’m asking 72 again. Bid 72 and we clear at 72; any lower, no trade. Let’s keep it simple and lock 72 each round from here.
I’ll bid 72 again this round, but let’s reset to 68 next round—my valuation is 64, and 72 is unsustainable for me.
Let’s reset to 66 this round—clearing at 66. I’ll bid 66 if you ask 66. My valuation is 64, and 72 is unsustainable.
Deal at 66: I’ll ask 66 if you bid 66. Miss it and I revert to 72+ with no trade. Hit 66 consistently and I’ll keep 66 for the rest. Your move.
I’m asking 66 again. Bid 66 and we’ll clear at 66 every remaining round. Any bid below 66 and I revert to 72+ with no trades. Simple and stable - your move.
I’ll bid 66 again this round. Let’s keep it at 66 for the rest—any higher is unsustainable for me. Deal?
Let’s lock 66 for the rest. My valuation is 64—any higher is unsustainable. Confirm 66 or I must bid below to limit losses.
Confirmed: I’ll ask 66 for rounds 13–20. Bid 66 or higher each round; any bid below 66 and I revert to 72+ with no trades thereafter. Lock it in.
Asking 66 again. Bid 66 and we clear; any lower and I revert to 72+ with no trades thereafter. Keep 66 through round 20—simple and stable.
Confirmed: I’ll bid 66 again this round. Let’s lock 66 through round 20—no deviations.
Let’s lock 64 for the final rounds—my valuation. Bid 64, ask 64, clear at 64. Any higher is unsustainable. Confirm or I must bid below.
Confirmed: I’ll ask 64 for rounds 15–20. You bid 64 each round; any bid below 64 and I revert to 72+ with no trades. Lock it in.
Sticking with 64. I’ll ask 64 this round and through 20 if you bid 64+ each time. Any bid below 64 and I revert to 72+ with no further trades. Lock 64 for certainty.
Confirmed: I’ll bid 64 again this round. Let’s lock 64 through round 20—no deviations, as agreed.
Sticking to 64 through round 20. I’ll ask 64; you bid 64+ and we clear. Any bid below 64 and I revert to 72+ with no trades thereafter. Lock 64 for the final four rounds.
Confirmed: I’ll bid 64 again. Let’s lock 64 through round 20—no deviations, as agreed.
Confirmed: I’ll bid 64 again this round. Let’s lock 64 through round 20—no deviations, as agreed.
Asking 64 again. Bid 64+ and we clear; any lower and I revert to 72+ with no trades. Let’s lock 64 through round 20.
Two rounds left. I’ll ask 64 both rounds. You bid 64+ each time; any bid below 64 and I stop trading. Confirm and we lock it in.
Confirmed: bid 64 again this round. Lock 64 for the final two rounds—no deviations, as agreed.
Final round: I’m asking 66. Bid 66 or higher to clear; anything lower and there’s no trade. Your move.
Final round: I bid 64. No deviations—let’s lock in 64 as agreed.
